/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/EnemyManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/PickupManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/SpriteRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/pItemRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/WeaponManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/BulletHoleManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/MapToSegments.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/BSP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/DoomRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/HUD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Menu/MainMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Menu/PauseMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Menu/GameOver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Menu/LevelEnd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/audio/AudioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/GameSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Engine/TextureManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Intro/StudioIntro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/third_party/stb_image_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FurySyrge.dir/Utils/PathUtils.cpp.o -o ../bin/FurySyrge  /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2main.a
